age_range.evidence: The D2M study was conducted shortly after the main age  20 years wave of data collection of z-proso in a convenience subsample  (n =255) of the main cohort. The main survey data  collection was conducted between April and September of 2018 when  participants were of median age 20.6 years.

fieldwork_year.evidence: The main survey data collection was conducted April and September of 2018

sample_size.evidence: The D2M study, which has tracked development from age 7 to 24 in ~1500 participants sampled from Zurich schools on school entry (Ribeaud et al., 2022). The D2M study was conducted shortly after the main age 20 years wave of data collection of z-proso in a convenience subsample (n =255) of the main cohort.
